title: INE Spain — Quarterly National Accounts (QNA): GDP by supply (output) and demand (expenditure), current prices, since 1995
units: EUR (current prices), levels and annual/quarterly variation rates; described in INE metadata
license_terms: INE public statistics, free reuse with attribution
notes: Downloaded via INE JaxiT3 CSV bulk-download endpoint. 30678 = GDP at market prices, supply/output side, current prices (seasonally adjusted and unadjusted, base and variation-rate series). 30680 = GDP at market prices, demand/expenditure side, current prices, same structure. Annual National Accounts (longer run, back further than 1995) exist as a separate INE operation but a stable JaxiT3 table id for the full historical annual series was not located in this session; QNA (quarterly, back to 1995) was confirmed reachable and downloaded instead. Follow-up: locate Annual National Accounts long-run table id for pre-1995 GDP levels.
